title: Dynamidium juranum
taxonomy: Dynamidium juranum is a species of diatom, which is a type of algae found in aquatic environments. Dynamidium juranum belongs to the genus Dynamidium and the family Gomphonemataceae. This classification suggests that Dynamidium juranum is a member of the larger group of diatoms within the class Bacillariophyceae. Diatoms are eukaryotic algae that are often found in freshwater and marine environments, and are characterized by their unique cell walls. Dynamidium juranum's specific classification highlights its relationship to other diatom species within the same family and genus.

The antioxidants present in Dynamidium juranum may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress, which can contribute to various diseases.
